name: Tropical Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions:
Cream margarine and brown sugar until smooth. Stir in flour, almonds, and coconut rum. Press into a greased 10x15 inch pan.
Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Cool.
Cheese Layer: Beat cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and coconut rum until creamy. Stir in pineapple, coconut, and nuts. Pour over the baked crust. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Cut into bars.
